creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
root@rimwksv:~# sha256 /usr/bin/install 
SHA256 (/usr/bin/install) = 4c96dd30fbd3220000ae93c580d35e5cb9d792cb1efab075c27ab67f1bc3ed33
root@rimwksv:~# 
root@rimwksv:~# sha256 /usr/src/obj_tmp/tmp/legacy/bin/install
SHA256 (/usr/src/obj_tmp/tmp/legacy/bin/install) = aad8fd0106fe8f8ec286b95d7921c6ed995256c869b60d23600e889551af4ed0


have no idea where /usr/src/obj_tmp/tmp/legacy/bin/install come from. I do /usr/src/obj_tmp dir remove before build world.
